title: homelife for easy living 35w 'Classic' Flexi Desk Lamp with Versatile Flexible Neck - Integral On/Off Switch - Approx. 34cm Height - L958GR - Anthracite Grey
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: CLASSIC DESIGN Simple and easy to operate with the integral on/off switch, this classic design flexi lamp looks stylish and will fit in with any room décor. UK plug mains operated for your convenience.
COMPACT DESIGN The Homelife 35w Classic Flexi Desk Lamp stand at approx. 34cm tall and has a flexible arm to adjust the angle of light exactly where you need it.

ADJUSTABLE FLEXI NECK The attached lampshade is designed to help radiate the light in the desired direction, making it ideal for both arm length and close up work such as hobbies, working or studying. Simply adjust the flexible neck into various positions to change the height, direction and angle of the light.

EXTRA SAFE The stable base holds the lamp securely and allows you to safely adjust the neck to position the light in the direction you need. The HOMELIFE 35w Classic Flexi Desk Lamp is ideal for working, studying and hobbies including reading, drawing, writing, model construction and more, or simply use as stylish ambient lighting on a shelf or table top around your home or office.
REPLACEABLE BULB Suitable for E14 35w max. Halogen bulbs not included or why not opt for 9w LED bulbs not included .
description: The HOMELIFE 35w 'Classic' Flexi Desk Lamp Lamp is designed to aid both arm length and close up work, perfect for working and studying aswell as many hobbies including reading, drawing, writing and more, or simply use as stylish ambient lighting on a shelf or table top around your home or office. The classic, simple design suits any room décor. To operate, simply plug into any UK mains socket, use the integral switch to turn on/off at the touch of a button and adjust the flexible neck into various positions to change the height, direction and angle you want the light to travel in. The compact and durable design sits at an approx. height of 34cm and has a sturdy base and attached lampshade to radiate the light. Suitable for E14 35w Max. Halogen bulbs (not included) or why not opt for the 9w LED bulbs (not included). Package Includes: 1 x HOMELIFE 35w 'Classic' Flexi Desk Lamp 1 x Instruction Manual
